html:
Exclusive to:

The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop is a naturally spawning Pig Shop Structure exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Palace Pig City and sells a variety of Weapons and Traps to the player.

If the player obtains the Key to the City, The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop also becomes craftable in the City Planning Tab using four Boards, three Spears and four Pig Skins.

Contents

  • 1 Interior
  • 2 Decor
    • 2.1 Shelfs
    • 2.2 Pillar
    • 2.3 Lamps
    • 2.4 Windows
    • 2.5 Doors
  • 3 Gallery

Interior

Upon entering The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop, the player will find a variety of Items that are sold in exchange for Oincs. A Hunter Pig shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name
Cutlass Supreme 50
Bird Trap 20
Coconade 20
Blow Dart 10
Boomerang 10
Sleep Dart 10
Tooth Trap 10
Halberd 5
Spear 3
Trap 2

Additionally, the following items can be bought from shelves which will not be restocked by the shopkeeper:

Item Name Amount
Twigs 1 4

Decor

  • Chest Closed
  • Beefalo Mounting
  • Shelve
  • Shield Axes Front

Shelfs

  • Windowed Cabinet

Pillar

  • Basic Wall Corner
  • Basic Wall Front

Lamps

  • Basic Lantern Sidewall
  • Basic Lantern Backwall

Windows

Doors

  • Exit

Gallery

  • The interior of a The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop.
StructuresCraftable Items

“Instruments of destruction.”
–Wilson
“Maybe they have a flaming axe in there.”
–Willow
“Wolfgang is stronger than any weapon.”
–Wolfgang
“Agents of death.”
–Wendy
“CONTAINS DESTRUCTIVE ATTACHMENTS”

“A boutique for items of brutality.”
–Wickerbottom
“Nothing in there as good you Lucy.”
–Woodie
“Well, well, well...”
–Maxwell
“Ah wonderful! A shop dealing in brutal means of destruction.”
–Wagstaff
“I shall prepare för battle within!”
–Wigfrid
“The things in there could really hurt someone.”
–Webber
“Whoa. Got some heavy gear in there.”
–Walani
“Battle utensils.”
–Warly
“I be'in need o'tha piratin' gear.”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA TAKE ARMS”
–Wilba
“Stuff for fighting”
–Wormwood
“Nothing as good as the Pew-matic in there.”
–Wheeler

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Cửa Hàng Vũ Khí Ngà Heo Rừng là một Cấu trúc Cửa Hàng Lợn sinh sản tự nhiên dành riêng cho Hamlet DLC. Nó được tìm thấy ở Thành phố Lợn Cung điện và bán nhiều loại Vũ khí và Bẫy cho người chơi.

'''The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop''' is a naturally spawning [[Pig Shops|Pig Shop]] [[Structures|Structure]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Pig City|Palace Pig City]] and sells a variety of [[Weapon]]s and Traps to the player.

If the player obtains the [[Key to the City]], The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop also becomes craftable in the [[City Planning Tab]] using four [[Boards]], three [[Spear]]s and four [[Pig Skin]]s.

==[[File:Door (Ancient Pig Ruins Exit) Map Icon.png|32px]] Interior==
Upon entering The Boar's Tusk Weapon Shop, the player will find a variety of [[Items]] that are sold in exchange for [[Oinc]]s. A [[Hunter Pig]] shopkeeper works at the desk.

The following items can be found on displays in the center of the shop which will be restocked by the shopkeeper:
